articles.title: Sebi introduces a simpler NISM certification for research services
articles.description: India's market regulator Sebi has introduced a simplified certification for employees in non-core research roles, aiming to ease business operations. Staff involved in sales and client interaction will now take a lighter NISM module, while those directly preparing research reports remain under the existing stringent examination. This reform reduces compliance burdens for client-facing roles, fostering greater participation in research-related activities.

dailyNews.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Iran Says Not Possible To Participate Amid War
dailyNews.description: 'The conditions do not exist for us to take part in the World Cup after this corrupt government murdered our leader,' says the sports minister.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict getting wider? As US moves shifts focus, North Korea rallies behind Iran, tests missiles
dailyNews.description: Kim Jong-un later hinted that important successes were achieved in putting strategic and tactical strike capabilities into practical use and deploying them for ‘actual war’.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Amazon, Google, Microsoft offices in Middle East under threat? IRGC releases ‘target list’
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war entered its 12th day, the IRGC threatened to target economic centres and banks linked to the US and Israel across the region. The warning came after an Israeli strike on a Tehran bank, with Iran also listing offices and infrastructure tied to major US tech firms.

dailyNews.title: Attacks from all sides: Why Iraq was dragged into US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Iraq has seen attacks from both sides of the conflict: Iran and its proxies on the one side and the US on the other.

dailyNews.title: Turkish president urges end to Iran war
dailyNews.description: Turkiye’s president has urged a return to the negotiating table before the Iran war “sets the entire region on fire.”

dailyNews.title: Van crash at White House gate prompts road closures in DC; driver detained, no injuries reported
dailyNews.description: The incident comes just days after two alleged ISIS terrorists hurled improvised explosive devices at a protest outside the New York mayor’s mansion.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Will Trump administration change its West Asia military strategy amid rising oil prices?
dailyNews.description: US officials believe the country can withstand a short-term spike in oil prices for up to four weeks. The White House calls the rise a temporary disruption and is taking steps to stabilise markets.

dailyNews.title: Return to Russian fuels would be ‘strategic blunder’ says top EU official
dailyNews.description: Returning to Russian fossil fuels would be a “strategic blunder” says European Commission president Ursula von der Leyen

dailyNews.title: South African soldiers deploy in Johannesburg to tackle crime and gangs
dailyNews.description: First troops touch down nearly a month after President Ramaphosa said organised crime threatened country's democracy.

dailyNews.title: Spain removes ambassador from Israel in protest to Iran war, Gaza genocide
dailyNews.description: Madrid recalls ambassador amid rising diplomatic tensions and criticism of US-Israeli actions in Iran.

dailyNews.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves in bid to curb soaring prices
dailyNews.description: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.title: Zoox plans to put its robotaxis on the Uber app in Vegas this year
dailyNews.description: The purpose-built robotaxis will be available on Uber's app in Las Vegas this year, and Los Angeles next year, if Zoox gets the federal approval it's been seeking.

dailyNews.title: Which countries have seen the highest petrol prices since the Iran war?
dailyNews.description: At least 85 countries have reported petrol price rises since the attacks on Iran by the US and Israel on February 28.

dailyNews.title: US once rejected Ukraine's anti-Shahed drone tech: How the 'tactical error' is costing Trump govt dear amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: In August 2025, Zelenskyy offered Trump Ukraine’s proven anti-Shahed drone tech, including low-cost interceptors and combat hubs, but the US dismissed it. After Iran’s drone attacks escalated in 2026, the US reversed course, requesting Ukraine’s help to protect bases in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Adjustable beds are up to 54% off for Sleep Week – Layla, Bear, DreamCloud and more
dailyNews.description: Customize your sleep with an adjustable base and shop sales from brands like Layla, Leesa, DreamCloud and Nolah.

dailyNews.title: US destroys 16 Iranian mine boats as Strait of Hormuz oil showdown escalates
dailyNews.description: U.S. forces destroyed 16 Iranian mine-laying vessels near Strait of Hormuz as oil traffic stalls through the critical shipping corridor amid rising tensions.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts 5-0 sweep by endorsed candidates in Tuesday primary elections
dailyNews.description: Trump's endorsed candidates had good results in Tuesday elections, as ex-White House fellow Clay Fuller advances to a Georgia runoff in April.

dailyNews.title: Chargers' Justin Herbert says Madison Beer 'changed my life forever' in birthday tribute: Who is the pop star?
dailyNews.description: Madison Beer has been linked to Los Angeles Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert, drawing increased interest from NFL fans curious about her background and career.

dailyNews.title: House GOP urges Trump to choke off Iran ally's oil profits as Middle East turmoil spikes US gas prices
dailyNews.description: House Republicans are urging President Trump to block profits from a major Russian oil company as Iran turmoil pushes gas prices higher across the U.S.

topStories.title: Trump delivered for tipped workers. Why do Democratic governors hate them?
topStories.description: Blue-state governors resist following Trump's tax-free tips policy, leaving service workers paying state taxes while federal relief provides limited help.

topStories.title: Secret Service detains, questions individual who drove vehicle into barricade near White House
topStories.description: An individual who drove into a barrier near the White House was detained for questioning on Wednesday morning, the U.S. Secret Service said.

topStories.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s War With Iran Changed the World in a Week
dailyNews.description: The conflict is reshaping travel patterns, energy dependencies, living costs, trade routes and diplomatic alliances.

dailyNews.title: A Trump-Xi Summit Nears, but China Doesn’t Know What Trump Wants
dailyNews.description: Trump’s agenda for the high-stakes meeting remains unclear to Beijing, Chinese analysts say, while American executives say they haven’t been invited along.

dailyNews.title: Trump Casts a Shadow Over One of Mexico’s Deadliest States
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to strike cartels inside Mexico. In Sinaloa State, a cartel stronghold, some residents said they were willing to entertain U.S. intervention.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Restart Global Entry Program
dailyNews.description: The program for people traveling internationally, set to come back online at 5 a.m. Wednesday, had been paused amid the shutdown of the Homeland Security Department.

dailyNews.title: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris Advance to Runoff in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Georgia District
dailyNews.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.

dailyNews.title: Iran attacks more ships, Dubai airport, warns U.S.-linked banks are next
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration says it's winning the war with Iran, Tehran hits 3 ships near the Strait of Hormuz, and Dubai airport, and warns banks are next.

dailyNews.title: What is the SAVE America Act? What to know about the bill Trump is pushing
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his allies are pushing Senate Republicans to pass an elections-related bill known as the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Vehicle crashes into barricade near White House, Secret Service investigating
dailyNews.description: A vehicle crashed into a barricade near the White House on Wednesday morning, authorities said.

dailyNews.title: Georgia Race to Replace Marjorie Taylor Greene Heads to Runoff
dailyNews.description: Voters in Georgia held their special election to replace former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene with Democrat Shawn Harris and Republican Clay Fuller, who was endorsed by President Donald Trump, advancing to the runoff in the closely-watched race. NBC’s Aaron Gilchrist reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Texas Senate endorsement race may hinge on passage of the SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: Trump frequently brings up the SAVE America Act, which would impose stricter voting requirements. He told NBC News he is "not doing anything" until Congress passes it.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump says there’s ‘practically nothing left to target’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28.
